entity.description: Assembly, one of the stations of the Israelites in the desert (Num. 33:22, 23).

nodes.label: Kehelathah
nodes.description: Assembly, one of the stations of the Israelites in the desert (Num. 33:22, 23).

verses.text: And they journeyed from Rissah, and pitched in Kehelathah.
And they went from Kehelathah, and pitched in mount Shapher.
